units.source_text: 4 2024年的企業中⼼數字包括出售加拿⼤銀⾏業務的增益，不計及出售業務的外匯對沖公允值變動，該數字於HSBC Overseas Holdings (UK) Limited中入賬。
units.translation_target_text: 4 Corporate Center figures for 2024 include the gain on the sale of the Canadian Banking business and exclude the fair value change in the foreign exchange hedges of the sale of the business, which is accounted for in HSBC Overseas Holdings (UK) Limited.
units.translation_en: 4 Corporate Center figures for 2024 include the gain on the sale of the Canadian Banking business and exclude the fair value change in the foreign exchange hedges of the sale of the business, which is accounted for in HSBC Overseas Holdings (UK) Limited.

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: 4 Corporate Center figures for 2024 include the gain on the sale of the Canadian Banking business and exclude the fair value change in the foreign exchange hedges of the sale of the business, which is accounted for in HSBC Overseas Holdings (UK) Limited.

units.source_text: 5 2024年的企業中⼼數字包括與出售阿根廷業務相關的虧損62億美元，以及公司間債務撇銷3億美元。
units.translation_target_text: 5 Corporate Center figures for 2024 include a loss of $6.2 billion related to the sale of the Argentina business, as well as a write-off of intercompany debt of $300 million.
units.translation_en: 5 Corporate Center figures for 2024 include a loss of $6.2 billion related to the sale of the Argentina business, as well as a write-off of intercompany debt of $300 million.

units.source_text: 為使不計及須予注意項⽬之平均有形股本回報率衡量指標與市場慣例更為⼀致，我們⾃2025年全年業績起不再就各期間的須予注意項⽬除稅後影響
units.translation_target_text: In order to make the measure of return on average tangible equity excluding noteworthy items more consistent with market practice, we will no longer measure the after-tax impact of noteworthy items in each period starting from the 2025 annual results.
units.translation_en: In order to make the measure of return on average tangible equity excluding noteworthy items more consistent with market practice, we will no longer measure the after-tax impact of noteworthy items in each period starting from the 2025 annual results.

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: In order to make the measure of return on average tangible equity excluding noteworthy items more consistent with market practice, we will no longer measure the after-tax impact of noteworthy items in each period starting from the 2025 annual results.
